query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN teamMemberId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_team_member, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'skipped' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as skipped_calls FROM calls;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN teamMemberId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_team_member, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'skipped' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as skipped_calls FROM calls;
